caption: A news broadcast features a man speaking into a handheld microphone, dressed in a white shirt and a white scarf with red accents, standing beside another man in a black polo shirt. The background consists of blurred outdoor foliage. The screen is overlaid with news graphics, including portraits of politicians and Hindi text. In the initial frames, the top banner reads "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाक़ी ह," with a red banner below stating "बिहा." As the sequence progresses, the text changes to "बिहार कैबिनेट की कल पहली बैठक होगी" on a red banner. Names like "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार," and "विजय चौधरी" appear beside the portraits. The "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo is visible in the upper right corner of several frames, accompanied by a digital clock showing "10:07 PM." The speaker continues gesturing and talking throughout the frames.
